10px}.project{cursor:pointer;width:100px;height:100px;z-index:1;opacity:.5}.project>img{border-radius:15px}.project:nth-child(2){height:130px;width:130px;transform:translateX(-5%);z-index:99;opacity:1}.project:nth-child(2)>img{max-height:110%;max-width:110%}#footer{display:flex;flex-direction:row;gap:60px;justify-content:center;position:sticky;bottom:0;background-color:grey;margin-top:5px;padding:5px;z-index:999}#footer>h2{margin-bottom:0}.contact{max-height:50px}.contact>a{color:#fff}img.contactIcon{width:30px;height:30px}@media
